list.ing: 2 oz Bourbon/Rye, 1 sugar cube, 2 dashes Angostura bitters, Orange peel, Ice
list.rec: Muddle sugar cube with bitters. Add bourbon and ice. Stir well. Express orange peel over glass and drop in.

list.ing: 2.5 oz Gin, 0.5 oz Dry Vermouth, Lemon twist or olive
list.rec: Fill mixing glass with ice. Add gin and vermouth. Stir 30 seconds. Strain into chilled glass. Garnish.

list.ing: 2 oz Rye Whiskey, 1 oz Sweet Vermouth, 2 dashes Angostura bitters, Cherry
list.rec: Stir all ingredients with ice. Strain into chilled glass. Garnish with cherry.

list.ing: 1 oz Gin, 1 oz Campari, 1 oz Sweet Vermouth, Orange peel
list.rec: Build in glass over ice. Stir briefly. Garnish with orange peel.

list.ing: 2 oz White Rum, 1 oz Lime juice, 0.75 oz Simple syrup
list.rec: Shake all ingredients vigorously with ice. Strain into chilled coupe.

list.ing: 2 oz Tequila, 1 oz Lime juice, 1 oz Triple Sec, Salt rim
list.rec: Rim glass with salt. Shake all ingredients with ice. Strain into glass.

list.ing: 2 oz Whiskey, 0.75 oz Lemon juice, 0.5 oz Simple syrup, Egg white
list.rec: Dry shake egg white 10 sec. Add other ingredients. Shake with ice. Strain.

list.ing: 2 oz Cognac, 1 oz Cointreau, 0.75 oz Lemon juice, Sugar rim
list.rec: Rim glass with sugar. Shake all ingredients with ice. Strain into glass.

list.ing: 2 oz Vodka, 0.5 oz Lime juice, 4 oz Ginger beer, Mint
list.rec: Fill copper mug with ice. Add vodka and lime. Top with ginger beer. Stir.

list.ing: 1.5 oz Gin, 0.75 oz Lemon juice, 0.5 oz Simple syrup, 3 oz Champagne
list.rec: Shake gin, lemon, syrup with ice. Strain into flute. Top with Champagne.

list.ing: 2 oz Aged Rum, 0.75 oz Lime juice, 0.5 oz Orange Curacao, 0.5 oz Orgeat, Mint
list.rec: Shake all with ice. Strain over crushed ice. Garnish with mint and lime.

list.ing: 2 oz White Rum, 1.5 oz Pineapple juice, 1.5 oz Coconut cream, Pineapple
list.rec: Blend all with crushed ice until smooth. Pour into glass. Garnish.

list.ing: 1.5 oz Vodka, 1 oz Blue Curacao, 4 oz Lemonade, Cherry
list.rec: Fill glass with ice. Add vodka and Blue Curacao. Top with lemonade. Stir.

list.ing: 1.5 oz Light Rum, 1.5 oz Dark Rum, 1 oz Apricot brandy, 1 oz Lime, 0.5 oz Grenadine
list.rec: Shake all with ice. Strain over crushed ice. Top with dark rum float.

list.ing: 2 oz Light Rum, 2 oz Dark Rum, 2 oz Passion fruit juice, 1 oz Orange juice, 1 oz Lime
list.rec: Shake all with ice. Strain into glass over fresh ice.

list.ing: 2 oz Gin, 4 oz Tonic water, Lime wedge
list.rec: Fill glass with ice. Add gin. Top with tonic. Squeeze lime wedge and drop in.

list.ing: 2 oz Rum, 4 oz Cola, Lime wedge
list.rec: Fill glass with ice. Add rum. Top with cola. Garnish with lime.

list.ing: 2 oz Vodka, 4 oz Soda water, Lime wedge
list.rec: Fill glass with ice. Add vodka. Top with soda. Squeeze lime.

list.ing: 2 oz Tequila, 4 oz Grapefruit soda, 0.5 oz Lime, Salt rim
list.rec: Salt rim. Fill glass with ice. Add tequila and lime. Top with grapefruit soda.

list.ing: 2 oz Dark Rum, 4 oz Ginger beer, Lime wedge
list.rec: Fill glass with ice. Add ginger beer. Float dark rum on top.

list.ing: 2 oz Light Rum, 4 oz Cola, 0.5 oz Lime juice
list.rec: Fill glass with ice. Add rum and lime. Top with cola.

list.ing: 0.5 oz each: Vodka, Gin, Rum, Tequila, Triple Sec, 1 oz Lemon, 2 oz Cola
list.rec: Shake spirits and lemon with ice. Pour into Collins glass. Top with cola.

list.ing: 0.5 oz Kahlua, 0.5 oz Baileys, 0.5 oz Grand Marnier
list.rec: Layer in order: Kahlua, Baileys (pour over spoon), Grand Marnier.

list.ing: 1.5 oz Jagermeister, Ice cold
list.rec: Serve well chilled. Shoot straight.

list.ing: 1 oz Vodka, 1 oz Triple Sec, 1 oz Lime juice
list.rec: Shake with ice. Strain into shot glasses.

list.ing: 1.5 oz Tequila, Salt wedge, Lime wedge
list.rec: Lick salt. Shoot tequila. Bite lime.

list.ing: 0.75 oz Irish Whiskey, 0.75 oz Peach Schnapps, 0.75 oz Sour mix, Sprite
list.rec: Shake all with ice. Strain into shot glass.

list.ing: 1.5 oz Vodka, 0.5 oz Cointreau, 0.5 oz Lemon, Sugar rim
list.rec: Shake with ice. Strain into sugar-rimmed shot.

list.ing: 1.5 oz Vodka, 1 oz Cranberry, 0.5 oz Triple Sec, 0.5 oz Lime
list.rec: Shake all with ice. Strain into chilled martini glass.

list.ing: 2 oz Vodka, 4 oz Tomato juice, 0.5 oz Lemon, Worcestershire, Tabasco, Salt, Pepper
list.rec: Shake all with ice. Strain into highball. Garnish with celery and olives.

list.ing: 2 oz Vodka, 1 oz Kahlua, 2 oz Heavy cream
list.rec: Build over ice in rocks glass. Pour cream slowly. Stir.

list.ing: 1.5 oz Vodka, 1 oz Kahlua, 1 oz Espresso, 0.5 oz Simple syrup
list.rec: Shake vigorously with ice. Double strain into chilled martini glass.

list.ing: 2 oz Vodka, 5 oz Orange juice
list.rec: Build in highball over ice. Stir gently.

list.ing: 1.5 oz Vodka, 3 oz Cranberry, 1 oz Grapefruit
list.rec: Build over ice in highball. Stir.

list.ing: 2 oz Tequila, 4 oz Orange juice, 0.5 oz Grenadine
list.rec: Build over ice. Add grenadine slowly. It sinks. DO NOT stir.

list.ing: 2 oz Tequila, 0.5 oz Lime, 4 oz Ginger beer, Mint
list.rec: Build in copper mug. Stir gently.

list.ing: 2 oz Reposado Tequila, 0.5 oz Cassis, 0.5 oz Lime, 3 oz Ginger beer
list.rec: Shake tequila, cassis, lime with ice. Strain over fresh ice. Top ginger beer.

list.ing: 2 oz Gin, 0.75 oz Lime juice, 0.5 oz Simple syrup
list.rec: Shake with ice. Strain into chilled coupe.

list.ing: 2 oz Gin, 0.5 oz Maraschino, 0.25 oz Creme de Violette, 0.75 oz Lemon
list.rec: Shake with ice. Strain into coupe.

list.ing: 2 oz Gin, 0.75 oz Lemon, 0.75 oz Honey syrup
list.rec: Shake with ice. Strain into coupe.

list.ing: 1.5 oz Gin, 0.5 oz Cherry brandy, 0.5 oz Benedictine, 4 oz Soda, Lime, Pineapple
list.rec: Shake gin, lime, pineapple, Benedictine. Strain. Top soda. Float cherry brandy.

list.ing: 0.75 oz Gin, 0.75 oz Green Chartreuse, 0.75 oz Maraschino, 0.75 oz Lime
list.rec: Shake with ice. Strain into coupe.

list.ing: 2 oz Gin, 0.5 oz Chambord, 0.5 oz Pineapple juice
list.rec: Shake with ice. Double strain into martini glass.

list.ing: 1.5 oz Bourbon/Rye, 1 oz Campari, 1 oz Sweet Vermouth
list.rec: Stir with ice. Strain into rocks glass over big cube.

list.ing: 2 oz Rye, 0.25 oz Absinthe, 1 sugar cube, Peychauds bitters, Lemon peel
list.rec: Rinse glass with absinthe. Muddle sugar + bitters. Add rye + ice. Stir. Express lemon.

list.ing: 2 oz Bourbon, 0.5 oz Simple syrup, 8 Mint leaves, Crushed ice
list.rec: Muddle mint + syrup. Pack crushed ice. Add bourbon. Churn until frosty.

list.ing: 1.5 oz Irish Whiskey, 5 oz Hot coffee, 1 tsp Brown sugar, Heavy cream
list.rec: Dissolve sugar in coffee. Add whiskey. Float cream on top (pour over spoon).

list.ing: 0.75 oz Bourbon, 0.75 oz Amaro Nonino, 0.75 oz Aperol, 0.75 oz Lemon
list.rec: Shake all with ice. Strain into coupe.

list.ing: 2 oz Scotch, 0.5 oz Amaretto
list.rec: Build over ice in rocks glass. Stir.

list.ing: 2 oz White Rum, 1 oz Lime, 0.75 oz Simple syrup, 10 Mint leaves, Soda water
list.rec: Muddle mint + syrup. Add rum + lime. Fill with crushed ice. Top soda.

list.ing: 2 oz Cachaca, 1 Lime (quartered), 2 tsp Sugar
list.rec: Muddle lime + sugar. Fill with crushed ice. Add cachaca. Stir vigorously.

list.ing: 2 oz Dark Rum, 4 oz Pineapple, 1 oz OJ, 1 oz Coconut cream, Nutmeg
list.rec: Blend with crushed ice. Pour into glass. Grate nutmeg on top.

list.ing: 1 oz Light Rum, 1 oz Dark Rum, 1 oz Blackberry brandy, 2 oz Pineapple, 1 oz Lime
list.rec: Shake with ice. Strain over crushed ice.

list.ing: 2 oz Dark Rum, 1 oz Lime, 0.5 oz Simple syrup, 2 oz Pineapple, Dash Angostura
list.rec: Shake all with ice. Strain over crushed ice. Top with bitters.

list.ing: 3 oz Prosecco, 2 oz White peach puree
list.rec: Pour peach puree into flute. Top with chilled Prosecco. Stir gently.

list.ing: 3 oz Champagne, 2 oz Fresh orange juice
list.rec: Pour OJ into flute. Top with chilled Champagne.

list.ing: 4 oz Champagne, 0.25 oz Creme de Cassis
list.rec: Pour cassis into flute. Top with Champagne.

list.ing: 3 oz Prosecco, 2 oz Aperol, 1 oz Soda, Orange slice
list.rec: Build in wine glass over ice. Stir gently.

list.ing: 1.5 oz Gin, 0.75 oz Lillet Blanc, 0.75 oz Grapefruit, 0.25 oz St Germain
list.rec: Shake with ice. Strain into coupe or flute.

list.ing: 1 oz Lime, 0.75 oz Simple syrup, 12 Mint leaves, Soda water
list.rec: Muddle mint + syrup. Add lime. Fill with crushed ice. Top soda.

list.ing: 4 oz Ginger ale, 0.5 oz Grenadine, 2 oz Sprite, Cherry
list.rec: Build over ice. Stir. Garnish with 3 cherries.

list.ing: 4 oz Orange juice, 2 oz Cranberry, 0.5 oz Lime, 2 oz Soda
list.rec: Build over ice. Stir. Garnish.

list.ing: 4 slices Cucumber, 4 oz Lemonade, 1 oz Simple syrup, Mint, Soda
list.rec: Muddle cucumber + mint. Add lemonade and syrup. Shake. Strain over ice. Top soda.

list.ing: 1 cup Sugar, 1 cup Water
list.rec: Heat equal parts sugar and water until dissolved. Cool. Store fridge 2 weeks.

list.ing: 0.5 cup Honey, 0.5 cup Warm water
list.rec: Whisk together until combined. Store refrigerated.

list.ing: 0.5 cup fresh Ginger (sliced), 1 cup Sugar, 1 cup Water
list.rec: Simmer 20 min. Strain. Cool. Store fridge 2 weeks.

list.ing: 1 cup Almond milk, 1 cup Sugar, 1 tsp Rose water, 0.5 tsp Orange flower
list.rec: Warm almond milk. Dissolve sugar. Add floral waters. Cool.

list.ing: 1 cup Pomegranate juice, 1 cup Sugar, 1 tsp Rose water
list.rec: Heat until dissolved. Cool. Real grenadine beats store-bought.
list.note: Use for Shirley Temples, Tequila Sunrise

list.ing: 1 cup Lemon juice, 1 cup Lime juice, 1 cup Simple syrup
list.rec: Combine and refrigerate. Use within 1 week.

list.ing: 4 Cinnamon sticks, 1 cup Sugar, 1 cup Water
list.rec: Simmer 15 min. Remove sticks. Cool. Store fridge.

list.ing: Cocktail shaker, Jigger, Mixing glass, Bar spoon, Hawthorne strainer, Fine strainer, Muddler, Citrus juicer, Y-peeler, Glassware
list.rec: Start with shaker + jigger + strainer. Build from there.
list.note: A good shaker is your most important tool.

list.ing: Vodka, Gin, White Rum, Bourbon, Rye, Tequila, Dry Vermouth, Sweet Vermouth, Triple Sec, Angostura Bitters, Campari
list.rec: With these 12 bottles you can make 50+ cocktails.
list.note: Add Lillet, Maraschino, Chartreuse for advanced recipes.

list.ing: Citrus twists, Lime wheels, Orange slices, Maraschino cherries, Mint sprigs, Pineapple wedges, Celery stalks, Olives, Cocktail onions
list.rec: Fresh always beats jarred. Use a Y-peeler for clean twists.
list.note: Express citrus oils over the drink for aroma.

list.ing: Large cubes, Crushed ice, Sphere molds, Block ice
list.rec: Bigger ice = less dilution. Buy silicone molds.
list.note: Use filtered water for crystal clear ice.
